exercises.code:
buf = ["a", "b", "END"]
i = 0
out = []
while True:
    if i > 10:
        raise RuntimeError("guard")
    item = buf[i]
    i += 1
    if item == "END":
        break
    out.append(item)
print(out)

exercises.code:
def tasa_reject(sts):
    n_total = len(sts)
    if n_total == 0:
        return None
    n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
    return n_reject / n_total
print(tasa_reject(["accept", "reject", "accept"]))
print(tasa_reject([]))

exercises.code:
sts = ["accept", "accept", "reject", "review", "accept"]
n_total = len(sts)
n_accept = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "accept")
n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
n_review = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "review")
print({"n_total": n_total, "n_accept": n_accept, "n_reject": n_reject, "n_review": n_review,
       "tasa_reject": n_reject / n_total if n_total else None})

exercises.justification_from_packet: [S04-T4-B-E2] clean vs total. Verifiqué la rúbrica del instruction y los tests del quiz_card; la solución se apoya solo en lo explícito del slim_packet/theory de esta sección.

exercises.code:
def batch_report(rows):
    n_total = len(rows)
    n_reject = sum(1 for r in rows if r.get("status") == "reject")
    return {
        "n_total": n_total,
        "n_reject": n_reject,
        "tasa_reject": (n_reject / n_total) if n_total else None,
        "ids": [r["id"] for r in rows],
    }
print(batch_report([{"id": "A", "status": "accept"}, {"id": "B", "status": "reject"}]))
print(batch_report([]))

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Teoria de range: stop exclusivo da tres valores 0,1,2.
S04 zip silencioso trunca; strict lanzaria ValueError.
Denominador = intentados/total, no solo accept ni 100 fijo.
continue avanza la iteracion actual del bucle de lineas.
Anidamiento n x n es cuadratico. Verifiqué la rúbrica del instruction y los tests del quiz_card; la solución se apoya solo en lo explícito del slim_packet/theory de esta sección.
